statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); session=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id[:8] // empty'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); if [ -z "$used" ]; then printf "%s · %s" "$model" "$session"; else cap=65; scaled=$(printf "%.0f" "$(echo "scale=2; $used * 100 / $cap" | bc)"); if [ "$scaled" -gt 100 ]; then scaled=100; fi; filled=$(printf "%.0f" "$(echo "scale=2; $scaled / 10" | bc)"); bar=""; for i in $(seq 1 10); do if [ $i -le $filled ]; then bar="${bar}█"; else bar="${bar}░"; fi; done; printf "%s · [%s] %s%% · %s" "$model" "$bar" "$scaled" "$session"; fi

hooks.command: input=$(cat); project=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-1]'); session=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id[:8]'); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message "${project} — ${session}" -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty -contentImage ~/.claude/claude-icon.png -sound default
